allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add input alert-dialog sheet badge --yes 2>&1)
Bash(echo "N" | npx shadcn@latest add input alert-dialog sheet badge 2>&1)

Bash(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT u.id as user_id, u.email, k.id as key_id, k.provider, k.label, k.\\"isActive\\" FROM \\"UserApiKey\\" k JOIN \\"User\\" u ON u.id = k.\\"userId\\" LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)
